name: clankers-text-stats
description: Text analysis utilities — word/char/line counts, character frequency analysis, and readability scoring without external dependencies

tool_definitions.name: text_stats
tool_definitions.description: Compute statistics about a block of text: word count, character count, line count, sentence count, average word length, and Flesch-Kincaid readability grade level.

tool_definitions.name: char_freq
tool_definitions.description: Compute character frequency distribution for the given text. Returns the top N most frequent characters with counts and percentages. Useful for analyzing patterns in text, code, or data.

top_n.description: Number of top characters to return (default: 10)

ignore_whitespace.description: Whether to exclude whitespace characters from the analysis (default: false)
